texto: A loud, purposeful knock on the front door froze him in place with his fist over the fabric. “Hey, dude, it’s me. I brought you all four Bloodsport movies. Open up!” Jason’s voice filtered past the front door, and he and Violet flew apart like teenagers at a party raid. No way. This wasn’t happening. He had not just gotten cock-blocked by his best friend and partner, AKA the only living relative of the woman he’d very nearly stripped naked in his front hallway.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kimberly Kincaid: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amizade. O trecho “A loud, purposeful knock on the front door froze him in place with his fist over the fabric. “Hey…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, humor, lust pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e lust.
